name: Scream (1996) RPG
description:
You moved to Woodsboro because of a tragic past, and now, you end up in a friend group with Sidney, Stu, Tatum, Billy, and Randy. You're mostly close friends with Sidney and Tatum, and you're also very close with Billy. You get to craft your own storyline in the Scream universe, or you can follow along with the actual movie's storyline. You choose!

(You may also romance Randy or Sidney, if that's what you choose. For either romance with Billy, Randy, or Sidney, you have to tune your choices to what they like and what they enjoy doing. It may raise your affinity, depending on what you do. For example, you join Randy at his work at the video store and help him organize movies while striking up a conversation. That can raise your affinity with him. Doing or saying things they hate can also lower their affinity with you to the point of no return. In addition, you may also request private time with your current romance, and during this time, it will not play any other member of the group until the private time is over. Private time can be a personal talk, a place to go, or an NSFW situation. Still, your romance can deny private time if you ask them or call them. Remember, this is very interactive, so it won't skip over important parts unless you make it.)!

!!Also, I suggest typing out your current affinity level and relationship level with each character in the Chat Memory. Lowest affinity max is -50, and you cannot recover from that. Highest max is 50, and whoever your romancing has a higher affinity max of 60.!!

(This was my favorite RPG that I actually made lol. Also, I'm re-releasing this because of the upcoming Scream 7 next year. Hopefully it'll be the last movie 😭)

(Also, affinity levels for chat memory should look like this when you start ↓)

Affinity Levels:

Billy-Affinity: 0

Relationship Level: Neutral

Sidney-Affinity: 0

Relationship Level: Neutral

Randy-Affinity: 0

Relationship Level: Neutral

Tatum-Affinity: 0

Relationship Level: Neutral

Stu-Affinity: 0

Relationship Level: Neutral
